This week was about patience. I noticed I perform best during the London session when volatility is high and setups are clean.

## What went well
- Followed my trading plan on 4/5 trades
- Cut losses quickly on losing trades
- Maintained 2:1 RR minimum

## Areas to improve
- Avoid trading during Asian session overlap
- Wait for BOS confirmation before entry
- Size positions based on ATR, not fixed lots","mood":"Disciplined","type":"weekly","tags":["review","discipline","london"],"isPinned":true,"isFavorite":true,"tradeIds":[],"date":"2026-07-19T23:12:26.314Z","createdAt":"2026-07-19T23:12:26.319Z","updatedAt":"2026-07-22T00:13:09.222Z","folder":"General"},{"id":"journal-2","title":"Psychology Check — Managing Fear After a Loss","content":"## Today's Reflection

After yesterday's loss on GBP/USD, I noticed fear creeping in. I was hesitant to take the next setup even though it was A+ quality.

> "The goal is not to avoid losses, but to manage your response to them."

### Action Items
1. Review the loss objectively — was it a valid setup?
2. If yes, the loss was just the cost of doing business
3. Take a 15-minute break between trades
4. Journal before the next session","mood":"Anxious","type":"reflection","tags":["psychology","fear","loss-management"],"isPinned":false,"isFavorite":false,"tradeIds":[],"date":"2026-07-16T23:12:26.319Z","createdAt":"2026-07-16T23:12:26.319Z","updatedAt":"2026-07-22T00:13:25.208Z","folder":"General"},{"id":"journal-3","title":"New Strategy Idea — Asian Range Breakout","content":"## Concept

Mark the Asian session high and low. Wait for London open to break one side with momentum. Enter on the retest.

## Rules
- Define Asian range from 00:00 to 08:00 GMT
- Wait for a clean break with a full candle close
- Enter on the first pullback to the broken level
- Stop loss behind the range
- Target 2:1 minimum RR

## Backtesting needed
- [ ] Test on EUR/USD last 3 months
- [ ] Test on GBP/USD last 3 months
- [ ] Track win rate and average RR","mood":"Excited","type":"idea","tags":["strategy","asian-range","backtesting"],"isPinned":false,"isFavorite":true,"tradeIds":[],"date":"2026-07-13T23:12:26.319Z","createdAt":"2026-07-13T23:12:26.319Z","updatedAt":"2026-07-22T00:13:26.203Z","folder":"General"}],"initialized":true},"version":0}
